source_to_target_total_flow: For every two-step route from "{source_label}" to "{target_label}", take the smaller value on that route's two bands. What is the sum of those route values?
Across all routes from "{source_label}" through a middle node to "{target_label}", sum the smaller band value from each route.
Find each directed route from "{source_label}" to "{target_label}". For each route, use the lower of its two band values, then add them.
What is the total usable flow from "{source_label}" to "{target_label}" if each two-band route contributes its smaller printed value?
Using all paths from "{source_label}" to "{target_label}", add the bottleneck value of each path.
path_bottleneck_value: Along the route "{source_label}" -> "{middle_label}" -> "{target_label}", what is the bottleneck flow, meaning the smaller of the two band values?
For the path "{source_label}" -> "{middle_label}" -> "{target_label}", what is the lower printed value on its two bands?
What is the smaller band value on the route "{source_label}" -> "{middle_label}" -> "{target_label}"?
Follow "{source_label}" through "{middle_label}" to "{target_label}". What is the minimum of the two shown flow values?
On the two-band path "{source_label}" -> "{middle_label}" -> "{target_label}", what is the bottleneck integer?
source_outgoing_total_flow: What is the total flow leaving source node "{source_label}"?
Add the values on all bands that start at source node "{source_label}". What is the total?
For source node "{source_label}", sum every outgoing band value.
Using the bands from "{source_label}" to the middle column, what total flow leaves that source?
What is the sum of all printed values on bands leaving "{source_label}"?
target_incoming_total_flow: What is the total flow entering target node "{target_label}"?
Add the values on all bands that end at target node "{target_label}". What is the total?
For target node "{target_label}", sum every incoming band value.
Using the bands from the middle column into "{target_label}", what total flow enters that target?
What is the sum of all printed values on bands entering "{target_label}"?

query:source_to_target_total_flow.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x,y] pixel points at all selected route bottleneck value labels used in the sum

query:path_bottleneck_value.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x,y] pixel point at the printed value label for the bottleneck band

query:source_outgoing_total_flow.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x,y] pixel points at every printed outgoing flow-value label used in the sum

query:target_incoming_total_flow.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x,y] pixel points at every printed incoming flow-value label used in the sum
